song_name: Ace Of Base - The Sign - La Roux - Bulletproof
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
BULLETPROOF

[Intro]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]              [ch]A#m[/ch]
I'm bulletproof, nothing to lose[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
fire away, fire away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]A#m[/ch]
ricochet, you take your aim[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
fire away, fire away[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]A#m[/ch]
you shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D#m[/ch]  [ch]D#sus2[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I am tita - ni  -  um[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]A#m[/ch]
you shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D#m[/ch]  [ch]D#sus2[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I am tita - ni  -  um[/tab]

[ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch] x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Been there, done that, messed around[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]
I’m having fun don’t put me down[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]D#m[/ch]
I’ll never let you sweep me off my feet[/tab]

I won’t let you in again
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]
The messages I’ve tried to send[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]D#m[/ch]
My informations’ just not going in[/tab]

Burnin’ bridges shore to shore
[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]
I’ll break away from something more[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]D#m[/ch]
I’m not to not to love until it’s cheap[/tab]

Been there, done that, messed around
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]
I’m having fun don’t put me down[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]D#m[/ch]
I’ll never let you sweep me off my feet[/tab]

is enough enough?

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]
I saw the sign and it opened up my mind[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#[/ch]                   [ch]D#m[/ch]
And I am happy now living without you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
I've left you, oh, oh, oh,oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
I saw the sign and it opened up my eyes, I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D#m[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#[/ch]
No one's gonna drag you up to get into the light where you belong[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#[/ch]
I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I saw the sign[/tab]

[ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]D#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]C#[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
I, I gotta new life,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]F#[/ch]
You would hardly recognize me, I'm so glad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]
How could a person like me care for you?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]
Why do I bother when you're not the one for me?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]C#[/ch]
Ooh, Ooh, Ooh[/tab]

Is enough enough?

[Chorus - acapella; faster]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]
I saw the sign and it opened up my eyes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#[/ch]                   [ch]D#m[/ch]
And I am happy now living without you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
I've left you, oh, oh, oh,oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
I saw the sign and it opened up my eyes, I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D#m[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#[/ch]
No one's gonna drag you up to get into the light where you belong[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#[/ch]
I saw the sign[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]
And it opened up my eyes I saw the sign[/tab]


Turn it around (acapella: play notes]

[ch]H[/ch]IGH
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Turn the beat around[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]E/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
love to hear percussion[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Turn it upside down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]E/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
love to hear percussion[/tab]


LOW
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Turn the beat around[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]E/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
love to hear percussion[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Turn it upside down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]E/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
love to hear percussion[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Love to hear it, love to hear it, love to hear percussion[/tab]

(end on F3m)
